summary: Deliverable incomplete: New-EnvironmentMatrix.Tests.ps1 (referenced line 28) and fixture files (basic.json, with-rules.json, too-large.json; workflow lines 36, 47, 56) are missing. Workflow will crash immediately when attempting Invoke-Pester. Main script (New-EnvironmentMatrix.ps1) is well-structured with proper error handling, but cannot be tested or validated via act without fixtures. Test harness (Run-ActTests.ps1) assumes these files exist but they're not provided. Script lacks `Set-StrictMode -Version Latest` (best practice for PowerShell).
